name: Datadog
description: Submit metrics, create events, and send logs to Datadog
author: awaitstep

metricName.label: Metric Name
metricName.description: Metric name. Used by: Submit Metrics.

metricValue.label: Metric Value
metricValue.description: Metric value. Used by: Submit Metrics.

metricType.label: Metric Type
metricType.description: Metric type. Used by: Submit Metrics.

tags.label: Tags
tags.description: Comma-separated tags. Used by: Submit Metrics, Create Event, Send Logs.

title.label: Title
title.description: Event title. Used by: Create Event.

text.label: Text
text.description: Event text or log message. Used by: Create Event, Send Logs.

alertType.label: Alert Type
alertType.description: Event alert type. Used by: Create Event.

source.label: Source
source.description: Log source. Used by: Send Logs.

hostname.label: Hostname
hostname.description: Hostname. Used by: Submit Metrics, Send Logs.

appKey.label: Application Key
appKey.description: Datadog application key. Required for: List Monitors.
